role_title: Associate Manager, Demand Forecasting and Tracking - Strategy & Operations

level_signals: 4+ years of experience in retail, CPG or media forecasting and analytics
Reports into Director of Go-To-Market and Demand

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of experience in retail, CPG or media forecasting and analytics.
You have a track record of building scalable forecasting tools that empower internal teams to be successful.
You bring strong business and analytical rigor, with advanced SQL and analytics experience.
You are comfortable using AI tools to accelerate your output (i.e. Cursor, Claude Code)

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You excel at influencing cross-functionally and aligning stakeholders on projects that require input from multiple teams.
You enjoy translating sales team needs and pain points into solutions that can be built to enable them to be successful.

scope.surface: CPG Ads demand forecasting, JBP scenario planning, and demand tracking within Ads Strategy & Operations
scope.business_model: B2B retail media network; CPG advertisers buying ad inventory on DoorDash platform
core_responsibilities: Own Partner GMV Forecasting: Leading the development of our capabilities to accurately project CPG partner growth that will occur on the DoorDash platform.

Own JBP Scenario Planning: Empowering our sales and partnerships team to effectively model different outcome scenarios based on different investment decisions based on CPG partnership goals and objectives
Establish Demand Tracking Capabilities: Help the team to diagnose business performance and what is driving weekly, monthly, quarterly and annual performance vs plan.
Support our Internal Planning Process: Work cross functionally with finance and sales operations to help ensure that we are building the most accurate and effective internal revenue goals.

green_flags: Clear ownership areas spelled out (GMV forecasting, JBP scenario planning, demand tracking, internal planning)
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Role reports directly to Director of Go-To-Market and Demand — visible leadership access
red_flags: Work location type not specified (remote, hybrid, or onsite unclear from JD body)
Pay range is national with localized adjustments, but no specific city tiers disclosed — actual pay could vary significantly
